metadata.description: Minimal Claude marketplace for exposing a transparent mise shim

plugins.name: sa-mise
plugins.description: Bootstraps the latest mise binary into Claude plugin data and exposes it via a transparent shim

plugins.name: sa-mise-forwarder
plugins.description: Runs shebang hooks through a local forwarder that delegates to the warmed sa-mise runtime

plugins.name: sa-mise-cross-plugin
plugins.description: Experimental consumer plugin that discovers sa-mise from PATH or shared Cowork runtime state
